mapper.select: SELECT s.share_id, s.from_user_id, u1.nick_name as from_user_nick_name, s.to_user_id, u2.nick_name as to_user_nick_name, s.file_id, s.file_name, s.folder_type, s.file_type, s.file_category, s.file_cover, s.file_size, s.valid_type, s.expire_time, s.share_time, s.status, CASE WHEN s.from_user_id = #{userId} THEN 1 ELSE 0 END as is_sender FROM friend_file_share s LEFT JOIN user_info u1 ON s.from_user_id = u1.user_id LEFT JOIN user_info u2 ON s.to_user_id = u2.user_id WHERE (s.from_user_id = #{userId} AND s.to_user_id = #{friendId}) OR (s.from_user_id = #{friendId} AND s.to_user_id = #{userId}) ORDER BY s.share_time ASC

SELECT s.share_id, s.from_user_id, u1.nick_name as from_user_nick_name, s.to_user_id, u2.nick_name as to_user_nick_name, s.file_id, s.file_name, s.folder_type, s.file_type, s.file_category, s.file_cover, s.file_size, s.valid_type, s.expire_time, s.share_time, s.status, 1 as is_sender FROM friend_file_share s LEFT JOIN user_info u1 ON s.from_user_id = u1.user_id LEFT JOIN user_info u2 ON s.to_user_id = u2.user_id WHERE s.from_user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY s.share_time DESC

SELECT s.share_id, s.from_user_id, u1.nick_name as from_user_nick_name, s.to_user_id, u2.nick_name as to_user_nick_name, s.file_id, s.file_name, s.folder_type, s.file_type, s.file_category, s.file_cover, s.file_size, s.valid_type, s.expire_time, s.share_time, s.status, 0 as is_sender FROM friend_file_share s LEFT JOIN user_info u1 ON s.from_user_id = u1.user_id LEFT JOIN user_info u2 ON s.to_user_id = u2.user_id WHERE s.to_user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY s.share_time DESC
